_comment: Curated People-Also-Ask questions, namespaced by market language. Cluster keys stay ENGLISH (matched case-insensitively against the article handle/title); the QUESTIONS under each cluster are in that market's language. 'en' drives the English base article; 'de'/'nl'/'fr'/… drive the native GEO answers in each locale's translation AND the per-market Perplexity/AI-Overview measurement. Fill the market maps from live per-market SERP screenshots (same cluster keys as 'en'). content_retrofit merges these with harvested data/processed/paa_snapshots.json.
